  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get file from Server"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/file/{fileName}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the byte stream of the file that was requested

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

  parameters={[{"name":"fileName","in":"path","description":"Name of file that the user wants to get from the Server","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}

  body={undefined}
